g.text: Recursive Functions in Call Graphs & Flame Graphs

ol.li: Physical stack shows N copies of the same function
Call graph collapses to single node with self-edge
Flame graph preserves visual representation of depth
Sample counts are attributed correctly regardless of approach

TCO (Tail Call Optimization) may hide recursion entirely The profiler cannot distinguish "deep recursion" from "many separate calls" without tracking individual call chains — samples are snapshots, not traces.
